Start a Conversation Explore Services

Who We Are

Quietly Exceptional

ProLuxe Travel is a corporate and luxury travel management company serving clients worldwide. Built on a foundation of nearly 20 years in global hospitality, we bring the relationships, insight, and operational rigour that only deep industry experience provides.

From multi-hotel group accommodation to strategic venue sourcing, we handle every detail so your team can focus on what matters.

Work with us →

What We Do

Our Services

Every engagement is built from scratch. Never templated, always tailored.

Group Accommodation

Negotiated rates, room block management, dietary and accessibility coordination for groups from ten to ten thousand.

Venue Sourcing

Access to a curated network of venues worldwide, from boardrooms to ballrooms, country estates to city rooftops.

Accommodation Sourcing

Finding the right property before a single room is booked. Site visits, relationship-led access to inventory, and rate negotiations that go beyond what is publicly available.

Why ProLuxe

Our Approach

Precision

Every detail is anticipated, confirmed, and double-checked. We don't leave room for surprises (unless they're the good kind).

Discretion

Your business is your business. We operate behind the scenes, ensuring seamless delivery without unnecessary noise.

Partnership

We don't just take briefs. We become an extension of your team, understanding your culture, standards, and expectations.

Experience

Nearly 20 years in corporate and luxury hospitality means we've seen it all, and built the relationships to handle anything.
